title: 「It’s time + 過去式」句型
titleZh: 「It’s time + 過去式」表示「已經拖延了一段時間，現在是時候應該……了」
titleEn: Using It’s time + past tense for overdue action

source.file: Sentence Structure 66 -「It’s time + 過去式」表示「已經拖延了一段時間，現在是時候應該……了」.pdf

formula: It’s time + subject + past-tense verb + other information

formulas.formula: It’s time + subject + past-tense verb + other information

example: I believe it’s time we went home.
exampleZh: 我認為我們是時候回家了。

examples.en: I believe it’s time we went home.
examples.zh: 我認為我們是時候回家了。

meaning.zh: It’s time + 過去式表示某人現在應該做某事，或某項行動已經拖延了一段時間，現在應該採取行動。

rules.en: Although the verb has a past-tense form, the sentence normally refers to the present or near future.
rules.zh: 雖然動詞使用過去式，但句子通常並不是描述過去，而是表示現在或不久之後應該做某事。

rules.en: Put a subject before the past-tense verb.
rules.zh: 使用 It’s time + 主語 + 動詞過去式；動詞前必須有主語。
examples: It’s time you started your homework.

rules.en: Use the normal past forms of verbs. With be, use was or were according to the subject.
rules.zh: 使用動詞的一般過去式；be 動詞則按照主語使用 was 或 were。
examples: It’s time I was in bed.
It’s time the children were in bed.

rules.en: The target uses a subject + past-tense verb, unlike the related forms It’s time to + base verb and It’s time for + person + to + base verb.
rules.zh: 本課目標句型使用主語 + 動詞過去式；相關的 It’s time to... 和 It’s time for someone to... 則使用 to + 動詞原形。
examples: It’s time for us to go home.

rules.en: It’s high time suggests something is seriously overdue; It’s about time often suggests the speaker has waited too long. These stronger forms are not required in this exercise.
rules.zh: It’s high time 通常表示事情嚴重拖延；It’s about time 常暗示說話者等候太久。本練習不要求使用這兩個較強烈的形式。
examples: It’s about time the bus arrived.

benefits.en: This structure tells the listener that something should not be delayed any longer.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能清楚告訴對方，某件事現在應該進行，不應再拖延。

benefits.en: Instead of giving a strong order, you can use this structure to encourage someone to act.
benefits.zh: 你不需要直接命令別人，也可以使用這個句型勸對方採取行動，聽起來較像提醒。

benefits.en: The structure is especially useful when someone has waited, delayed or avoided something for too long.
benefits.zh: 當某人等待、拖延或逃避某件事太久時，這個句型特別實用。

benefits.en: Instead of beginning many sentences with You should, you can use It’s time to create more sentence variety.
benefits.zh: 你不需要每句都使用 You should，也可以使用 It’s time 增加句式變化。

benefits.en: You can use it to discuss personal habits, family decisions, school problems, workplace changes and public issues.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可用於討論個人習慣、家庭決定、學校問題、職場改變及公共議題，在會話、討論及議論文中都十分實用。

en: Rewrite each sentence using It’s time + subject + past tense to show that something should happen now or has already been delayed.
Keep any introductory words or clauses when they are needed.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 It’s time + 主語 + 過去式 改寫以下句子，表示某件事現在應該進行，或已經拖延了一段時間。
如答案需要保留引入語或從句，請把它們保留下來。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: We should go home now.
questions.promptZh: 我們現在應該回家了。
questions.answer: It’s time we went home.
questions.answerZh: 我們是時候回家了。
questions.highlight: It’s time we went home.

questions.promptZh: 你現在應該開始做功課了。
questions.answer: It’s time you started your homework.
questions.answerZh: 你是時候開始做功課了。
questions.highlight: It’s time you started your homework.

questions.answerZh: 這間慈善機構已經依賴單一捐款者太久，因此是時候制定更多元化的資金計劃了。

questions.prompt: Everyone on the board has received the report. The final vote has already been postponed twice, so the board should hold it now.
questions.promptZh: 董事會所有成員都已經收到報告。最終表決已經兩次延期，因此董事會現在應該進行表決了。
questions.answer: Everyone on the board has received the report, and after two postponements, it’s time the board held the final vote.
questions.answerZh: 董事會所有成員都已經收到報告，而在兩次延期後，董事會是時候進行最終表決了。
questions.highlight: Everyone on the board has received the report, and after two postponements, it’s time the board held the final vote.
